CustomField.description: The text string appended to Household names when the number of members exceeds the Contact Overrun Count. Common values include " Family" or " and Friends." For example, with a count of 2 and overrun of " Family," a 4-member household might be named "Smith & Jones Family."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Text appended when Household has more members than the Contact Overrun Count. Example: " Family" or " and Friends."
CustomField.label: Name Overrun
